ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of training metrics */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance of the model */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before optimization */,
  "perplexity" REAL /* Perplexity of the model */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return of the model */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the model */,
  "time" REAL /* Total training time */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after optimization */,
  "max_kl" REAL /* Maximum Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence */,
  "mean_kl" REAL /* Mean Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return of the model */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standard deviation of returns */,
  "num_trajs" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Iteration time */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return of the model */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration ID */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for training */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken for training */,
  "validation_time" REAL /* Time taken for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training iteration */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the iteration */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the iteration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "iteration_type" TEXT /* Type of iteration (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  "iteration_status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration */,
  "iteration_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the iteration */,
  "iteration_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the iteration */,
  "iteration_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "version_control" TEXT /* Version control system used for the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "model_recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "model_f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric ID */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration ID */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Actual score value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES training_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  "version_tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iteration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration ID */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iteration_logs_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration ID */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

Unique identifier for each training iteration
Status of the iteration (e.g., running, completed, failed)
Type of iteration (e.g., training, testing, validation)
Reference to the user who created the model
Timestamp of when the model was created
